Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Re: Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Sanctions issued on 10/22/02 to Anthony L. Head, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings not reported. (212)
